summary: Comprehensive testing of Chroma Key Protocol v3 with new features: SeekerPage mythology, ProtocolChat AI-guided 5-phase system, and restructured Dashboard with roadmap. All 23 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: API root endpoint accessible
Backend: Admin user login (test@demo.com) with is_admin=true, act3_unlocked=true
Backend: Regular user login (test2@demo.com)
Backend: Invalid credentials rejected (401)
Backend: Auth me without token returns 401
Backend: Auth me with session returns user data
Backend: GET /progress returns user progress
Backend: GET /reflections/{act} returns reflections
Backend: PUT /reflections updates reflection items
Backend: Journal CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Backend: Logout endpoint works
Backend: GET /protocol/sessions returns session list
Backend: POST /protocol/chat endpoint structure (returns 402 budget exceeded - expected)
Backend: Protocol chat without auth returns 401
Backend: Protocol sessions without auth returns 401
Backend: GET /license/status returns unlock status
Backend: POST /license/validate rejects invalid keys
Backend: POST /payments/checkout blocked for unlocked users
Backend: POST /payments/checkout requires authentication
Backend: PUT /progress updates user progress
Backend: GET /admin/users returns user list
Backend: GET /admin/license-keys returns license keys
Backend: GET /tracks returns audio bank tracks
Frontend: Login page loads with cyber-noir design
Frontend: Dashboard loads with roadmap showing 4 act cards
Frontend: Seeker's Echo section visible on dashboard with mythology text
Frontend: Dashboard strip with Quick Actions panel (Protocol Engine, Wheel, Journal)
Frontend: Action strip with Begin Protocol Session, Unlock Full System, Meet The Seeker buttons
Frontend: Sidebar navigation shows all links (Dashboard, Protocol Engine, The Seeker, The Wheel, Journal, Admin Panel)
Frontend: The Seeker page loads with origin story (6 chapters), framework, and companion guide
Frontend: Protocol Engine page loads with 5-phase progress bar (Recognition, Excavation, Specificity, Claiming, Declaration)
Frontend: Protocol Engine has session management (New, Sessions buttons)
Frontend: Protocol Engine has privacy disclaimer
Frontend: Protocol Engine input and send button functional
Frontend: Act I card navigates to /act/1
Frontend: Act II card navigates to /act/2
Frontend: Admin Panel loads with Audio Bank, License Keys, Users, Guide tabs
Frontend: Paywall modal opens from Unlock Full System button with $14.99 Protocol License option
Frontend: Paywall modal shows Album Access Key input
Frontend: Sidebar Protocol Acts show correct lock states (Sealed for Act IV)
Frontend: Dashboard roadmap shows progress bar reflecting completed acts
Frontend: Logout button works and redirects to login
critical_code_review_comments: Protocol Engine uses GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM Key - budget exceeded error (402) is handled gracefully with user-friendly message
All new features (SeekerPage, ProtocolChat, Dashboard roadmap) are well-implemented with proper data-testid attributes
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - using existing test users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major feature additions complete: 1) SeekerPage at /seeker with full mythology (6 chapters, framework, companion guide), 2) ProtocolChat at /protocol with AI-guided 5-phase system (Recognition > Excavation > Specificity > Claiming > Declaration), 3) Restructured Dashboard with roadmap showing 4 act cards with step checklists and status badges. Protocol Engine uses GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM Key - budget may be exceeded (returns 402). Frontend shows friendly message. All sidebar navigation working. Admin panel accessible for admin users. Paywall modal triggered via ?showUnlock=true query param.

notes.protocol_engine_llm: Uses GPT-5.2 via emergentintegrations library. Budget exceeded error (402) is expected and handled gracefully.
notes.videos_placeholder: Videos in Act pages remain placeholder as noted in requirements.
